query_name: 顧客ID抽出_TPマッチング_店舗TP_ver1.0
query_string:
with order_log as (
  select
    distinct
    order_id
    , property_id
  from
    _integration_datamart.cls_order_detail
  where
    time >= td_time_parse('2025-09-01', 'jst')
    and time <= td_time_parse('2025-12-01', 'jst')
)

, agg_tp_review as (
  select
    therapist_id
    , count(distinct id) as review_count
  from
    _l1_mysql_hp.reviews
  where
    td_time_parse(created, 'jst') >= td_time_parse('2025-09-01', 'jst')
    and td_time_parse(created, 'jst') <= td_time_parse('2025-12-01', 'jst')
    and rate in (1,2)
  group by
    1
)

, property_list as (
  select
    distinct
    property_id
  from
    order_log
)

, tp_show_ranking as (
  select
    distinct
    therapist_id
    , show_ranking_type
  from _l0_mysql_core.therapist_additional_info
  inner join (select therapist_id, max(updated_datetime) as updated_datetime from _l0_mysql_core.therapist_additional_info group by 1) 
  using (therapist_id, updated_datetime)
)

, review_log as (
  select
    therapist_id
    , customer_id
    , order_id
    , property_id
    , rate
    , gender
  from
    _l1_mysql_hp.reviews
  inner join 
    order_log using (order_id)
  left join
    _integration_datamart.mst_therapist using (therapist_id)
  inner join
    (select distinct therapist_id from sandbox_hiveiq.tmp_tp_card_info where card_public_info_flag = 1) using (therapist_id)
  inner join
    (select distinct therapist_id from tp_show_ranking where show_ranking_type = '01') using (therapist_id)
  where
    rate in (1,2)
    and therapist_id in (select therapist_id from agg_tp_review where review_count >= 20)
)

, agg_satisfaction as (
  select
    therapist_id
    , property_id
    , gender
    , count(distinct if(rate = 1, order_id)) as positive_count
    , count(distinct if(rate = 2, order_id)) as negative_count
    , count(distinct order_id) as total_count
    , count(distinct if(rate = 1, order_id)) / count(distinct order_id) as positive_rate
    , count(distinct if(rate = 2, order_id)) / count(distinct order_id) as negative_rate

    /* 男性TP */
    , count(distinct if(rate = 1 and gender = '男性', order_id)) as positive_count_male
    , count(distinct if(rate = 2 and gender = '男性', order_id)) as negative_count_male
    , count(distinct if(gender = '男性', order_id)) as total_count_male
    , 1.0*count(distinct if(rate = 1 and gender = '男性', order_id)) / nullif(count(distinct if(gender = '男性', order_id)), 0) as positive_rate_male
    , 1.0*count(distinct if(rate = 2 and gender = '男性', order_id)) / nullif(count(distinct if(gender = '男性', order_id)), 0) as negative_rate_male

    /* 女性TP */
    , count(distinct if(rate = 1 and gender = '女性', order_id)) as positive_count_female
    , count(distinct if(rate = 2 and gender = '女性', order_id)) as negative_count_female
    , count(distinct if(gender = '女性', order_id)) as total_count_female
    , 1.0*count(distinct if(rate = 1 and gender = '女性', order_id)) / nullif(count(distinct if(gender = '女性', order_id)), 0) as positive_rate_female
    , 1.0*count(distinct if(rate = 2 and gender = '女性', order_id)) / nullif(count(distinct if(gender = '女性', order_id)), 0) as negative_rate_female
  from
    review_log
  group by
    1,2,3
)

, agg_rank as (
  select
    *
    , row_number() over (partition by property_id order by positive_rate desc, negative_rate asc) as satisfaction_rank
    , row_number() over (partition by property_id order by positive_rate_male desc, positive_count_male desc) as satisfaction_rank_male
    , row_number() over (partition by property_id order by positive_rate_female desc, positive_count_female desc) as satisfaction_rank_female
  from
    agg_satisfaction
)

, rank1_tp as (
select
  property_id as store_id__property_id
  , max(if(positive_rate_male > 0 and satisfaction_rank_male = 1, therapist_id)) as tp_male_rank1
  , max(if(positive_rate_female > 0 and satisfaction_rank_female = 1, therapist_id)) as tp_female_rank1
from
  agg_rank
group by
  1
order by
  1
)

, additional_tp_candidate as (
  select
    t0.property_id as store_id__property_id
    , t0.therapist_id
    , t0.gender
    , t0.satisfaction_rank
    , row_number() over (partition by t0.property_id order by t0.satisfaction_rank) as overall_rank
  from
    agg_rank as t0
  join
    rank1_tp as t1
      on t0.property_id = t1.store_id__property_id
  where
    (t1.tp_male_rank1 is null or t0.therapist_id <> t1.tp_male_rank1)
    and (t1.tp_female_rank1 is null or t0.therapist_id <> t1.tp_female_rank1)
    and (t1.tp_male_rank1 is null or t1.tp_female_rank1 is null)
)

-- 店舗ごとに1人だけ additional_tp を取る
, additional_tp as (
  select
    store_id__property_id
    , therapist_id as additional_tp
    , gender as additional_tp_gender
  from
    additional_tp_candidate
  where
    overall_rank = 1
)


, tmp as (
select
  t0.store_id__property_id
  , t0.tp_male_rank1
  , t0.tp_female_rank1
  , t1.additional_tp
  , case
      when t0.tp_male_rank1 is null and t0.tp_female_rank1 is not null and t1.additional_tp_gender = '女性' then 1
      when t0.tp_male_rank1 is not null and t0.tp_female_rank1 is null and t1.additional_tp_gender = '男性' then 2
      else null
    end as additional_flag
from
  rank1_tp as t0
left join
  additional_tp as t1
  on t0.store_id__property_id = t1.store_id__property_id
)

select
  t0.property_id as store_id__property_id
  , t1.tp_male_rank1
  , t1.tp_female_rank1
  , t1.additional_tp
  , t1.additional_flag
from 
  property_list as t0 
left join
  tmp as t1
  on t0.property_id = t1.store_id__property_id
order by
  1
